plist.dict:
CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundleShortVersionString 1.0 CFBundleVersion 1 CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleName $(PRODUCT_NAME) CFBundlePackageType $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_PACKAGE_TYPE) UILaunchScreen
DJISDKAppKey dd41f343bf432b0adcc41965 ELEVENLABS_API_KEY <<<<<<< HEAD ELEVENLABS_API_KEY ======= a565fc97fe1f3cc5570bd0c7f822d9882b10588e1a9016386079984967aa2ad4 BACKEND_BASE_URL $(BACKEND_BASE_URL) >>>>>>> 1e429ef368f1e7032c5f1250205be4bedc6cd225 NSAppTransportSecurity
NSAllowsArbitraryLoads
UISupportedExternalAccessoryProtocols
com.dji.video com.dji.protocol com.dji.common
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription This app requires microphone access to record your voice flight commands for ElevenLabs. NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription This app needs speech recognition to detect when you say 'Ok/Hey Nimbus' or 'Ok/Hey Numbers' to launch drone control commands.
